n: Chapter 12: The Bearer of the Sword

steps.t: The former bearer of the Rohirrim sword may be close to death somewhere on the road south of the blockade in the Windfells. Saeradan wants you to sear…
Saeradan is at his camp in the Windfells. You have found the former bearer of the sword, but he was not one of the Rohirrim at all. It was Wadu of the…
